lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Aye? Ye got some stuff te stash?

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: This be a branch of the Bank of Gielinor. Ye may have heard of us.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: We keep an eye on yer loot for ye. Leave yer valuables with us if ye want to keep 'em nice and safe.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Real secure. Before we got here, people were just dumpin' stuff into a bucket guarded by a man with an iron bar.

lines.speaker: Banker
lines.text: Since we arrived, we can get all the stuff organised nice and civil like, and with only half as many kneecappins.
